calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: 2:05PM, Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda fields: c/c for court trial, case settled before trial and terms were put on the record.
1. Defendant will pay plaintiff $5000.00 with cash or a cashier's check on or before 12/4/02, there will be no grace period.
2. If paid by cashier's check, check is to be made payable to Bartlett & Leader-Picone's
attorney trust fund.
3. Defendant agrees to sign a stipulation for entry of judgment and should he fail to
abide by the terms as set forth, plaintiff can apply by ex parte, with proper notice
to defendant, for entry of judgment.
4. If defendant complies with all terms plaintiff will dismiss the cause with prejudice.

Mr. Droubay acknowledges, on the record, that he understands and agrees with the settlement terms as set forth. There being no further matters, court adjourns.
